alpha.title: APrism-Home
alpha.content: This is the official website of the AperturePrism team, showcasing our vision, team members, and core projects. Built with Next.js 15, it combines Tailwind CSS and Framer Motion to create a fluid visual experience.

neon.title: Fur-Img-API
neon.description: Team Project: Random Image API Based on Node.js
neon.content: Fur-Img-API is a high-performance random image distribution service designed for community developers. It offers simple RESTful APIs with support for various categories and size filtering.

nai2openai.title: NovelAI to OpenAI Proxy
nai2openai.description: NovelAI Image Generation API to OpenAI Format Proxy Service
nai2openai.content: A high-performance, powerful middleware service that converts NovelAI's image generation API into standard OpenAI DALL-E 3 compatible format. Supports multi-tenant Key system, Web management panel, and automatic image archiving.

adminWebUI.title: Aprism FRP Admin
adminWebUI.description: Management and access platform for private intranet penetration
adminWebUI.content: AperturePrism is a management and access platform for private intranet penetration, providing a control plane (Node API + React Console), and plans to rewrite the data plane in Rust. It offers node/client/proxy management, full-link logging, and event archiving.

gmi.title: GMI Mental Illness Guide
gmi.description: Chinese mental health knowledge base based on MkDocs
gmi.content: GMI (Mental Illness Guide) is a Chinese mental health knowledge base built on MkDocs and mkdocs-material. The goal is to provide the public with systematic, reliable, and easy-to-understand information on mental illness and medical guidance, reducing stigma and promoting understanding and support.

dual-track-development.title: Dual-Track Development: nai2openai & Aprism FRP Admin Progress
dual-track-development.excerpt: The AperturePrism team is fully engaged in the dual-track development of nai2openai and Aprism FRP Admin. This article shares our exploration and progress in image generation proxy services and intranet penetration management.
dual-track-development.content:
At AperturePrism, we are always exploring the boundaries of technology. Recently, our team has been in a dual-track development mode on two major fronts: **nai2openai** and **Aprism FRP Admin**.

### nai2openai: Breaking Ecosystem Barriers

**nai2openai** was born to solve the incompatibility between NovelAI's image generation API and the mainstream OpenAI ecosystem. By providing a high-performance middleware service, we seamlessly integrate NovelAI's powerful drawing capabilities into existing OpenAI client ecosystems.

Current development focus includes:
- **Protocol Compatibility**: Ensuring perfect support for OpenAI's `/v1/images/generations` interface standard.
- **High-Performance Async Processing**: Building a high-concurrency architecture using FastAPI and HTTPX to ensure ultra-low latency under high loads.
- **Multi-Tenant Management**: Perfecting the Key distribution system, supporting the distribution of multiple OpenAI-formatted sk-keys from a single NovelAI account for team or community sharing.

### Aprism FRP Admin: A New Choice for Private Intranet Penetration

On the other hand, **Aprism FRP Admin** carries our vision for private intranet penetration management. We are well aware of the pain points in visualization and permission control of existing frp management solutions, so we decided to build a modern management platform from scratch.

Current progress includes:
- **Control Plane**: The Web console based on Node.js and React is taking shape, supporting node management, configuration file generation, and visual status monitoring.
- **Data Plane Planning**: We plan to introduce Rust to rewrite the data forwarding layer in the future to provide ultimate performance and memory safety.

### Outlook

Dual-track development brings significant challenges but also greatly stimulates the team's potential. We look forward to seeing both projects mature and meet everyone in the near future, bringing more convenience and possibilities to the community.

welcome-to-aperture-prism.title: Welcome to AperturePrism
welcome-to-aperture-prism.excerpt: We are thrilled to announce the official launch of the AperturePrism website. This is a new beginning.
welcome-to-aperture-prism.content:
AperturePrism is not just a team, but an experiment in innovation and aesthetics. We are dedicated to combining frontier technology with ultimate design to create amazing digital experiences.

In this blog, we will share our development journey, design thinking, and outlook for the future. Whether you are a developer, designer, or tech enthusiast, welcome to follow our updates.

design-philosophy.title: Our Design Philosophy: Apple-Class
design-philosophy.excerpt: Why do we pursue ultimate simplicity and detail? Dive deep into the design concepts behind AperturePrism.
design-philosophy.content:
At AperturePrism, we believe design is not just how it looks, but how it works. Influenced by Apple's design aesthetics, we strive for ultimate simplicity, intuitiveness, and detail.

Every pixel shift, every animation curve is meticulously crafted. Because we believe that only obsession with detail can achieve great products.
